headline: Barclays Raises Altria (MO) Price Target on Potential Sector Re-Rating Opportunity
summary: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) is included among the 10 Best Long Term Low Risk Stocks to Buy According to Hedge Funds. On May 15, Barclays raised its price recommendation on Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) to $64 from $63. It reiterated an Underweight rating on the stock.
